testcase.name: Contents verification
testcase.system-out: Given user opens the "Chrome" browser.......................................passed When user enters the url as "http://ietm.codeandpixels.net/#/"..............passed Then user is to enter username as "*******".................................passed Then user is to enter password as "*****"...................................passed Then user is to click the button "SUBMIT"...................................passed Then user is to click the "Enter IETM"......................................passed And user is to click General Information module.............................passed And user is to click the Abbreviations content..............................passed And user is to click the videos used in this IETM content...................passed And user is to click the Terms and Definitions content......................passed And user is to click the Warning and Safety content.........................passed
